name: Quote
description: Transforms each item into a quote card with a star rating, quote body, and optional author.

stars.name: stars
stars.description: Asterisks-only source text, typically in emphasis markup, because the code counts literal '*' characters.

author.description: Author line, typically authored in strong markup.

usageNotes: Because the implementation accesses the stars element directly, the star line should be treated as required in generated content.
This block appears to be styled mainly within hero contexts.
Documented sample names: Quote in hero banner.
ambiguityNotes: The code expects a specific authored pattern rather than named fields, so the field names here are inferred and normalized for machine use.
